category_sources: Official GitHub repository description says it is a Git plugin that prevents sensitive data from being committed.
source_facts.description says it prevents sensitive data from being committed.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is ezekg/git-hound.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes the project README as its documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ezekg/git-hound, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official project description identifies it as a Git plugin for this security use case.
source_facts.description identifies prevention of sensitive-data commits.
